trivia_bullets.text: Theros Beyond Death centers on the Returned: mortals who escaped Theros's Underworld but surrendered their identities. They re-enter the living world with no memories, wearing golden funerary masks as surrogate selves. The name Noston comes from the Greek 'nostos,' meaning 'to return home.'

Flavor text: 'The Returned retain no memory of their identities, but sometimes they mindlessly attempt familiar tasks.' This is the canonical design statement of the Returned as a zombie typology: not undead-hungry, but hollow — muscle memory without self.

Grim Physician is a 1/1 for {B} with a death trigger that gives -1/-1 to an opponent's creature. Hipsters of the Coast rated it C, noting it 'hits 10/55 common creatures and trades with 11 two-toughness creatures in combat,' making it a limited role-player in sacrifice-oriented black strategies.
sources: Hipsters of the Coast: Every Common in Theros Beyond Death Reviewed

trivia_bullets.text: The golden masks worn by the Returned are described as 'the last gifts of the selves they left behind' — crafted from gold, the most common material in Erebos's realm. The Grim Physician's hollow performance of medical tasks with no self-awareness is one of THB's more unsettling Returned depictions.
